item.title: Direct Rx: DULOXETINE D/R, a) 30 mg ( Recall
item.summary: CGMP Deviations: Presence of N-nitroso-duloxetine impurity above FDA recommended interim limit Product details: DULOXETINE D/R, a) 30 mg (NDC 61919-482-30), 30 Caps; b) 30 mg (NDC 61919-482-60), 60 Caps; CYMBALTA, Packaged and Distributed by Direct Rx.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
